title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
summary: Australian Payments Plus 利用 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 加速处理支付复杂性，节省时间、提升质量，并保持人类判断的核心地位。
highlights: Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity.
AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.
